title: Record: Full GPTQ + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1171 (3-seed mean, no TTT)
body:
## Record: Full GPTQ + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1171

**val_bpb = 1.1171** (3-seed mean, std 0.0003) | **~15.95 MB** | 8×H100 SXM | **No TTT**

### 3-Seed Results (8×H100 80GB SXM, PyTorch 2.9.1+cu128)

| Seed | step_avg | steps | Pre-quant bpb | **Post-GPTQ sliding bpb** | Artifact |
|------|----------|-------|---------------|--------------------------|----------|
| 2025 | 83.4ms | 7,182 | 1.1385 | **1.1167** | 15,901,230 |
| 1337 | 83.3ms | 7,189 | 1.1388 | **1.1171** | 15,962,990 |
| 2024 | 83.3ms | 7,201 | 1.1386 | **1.1173** | 15,994,746 |
| **Mean** | **83.3ms** | **7,191** | **1.1386** | **1.1171 (std 0.0003)** | |

Full GPTQ improves post-quant BPB by **0.0216** vs pre-quantization — turning quantization from a quality loss into a quality gain.

### Key Innovation: Full Hessian GPTQ for Banked Weights

Standard GPTQ-lite (percentile clip search) gives 1.1218 from the same pre-quant model. Full GPTQ gives **1.1171** — an additional **0.0047 BPB improvement** from Hessian-aware error compensation.

Implementation challenge: our model uses Parameter Banking (3D weight tensors, no nn.Linear modules). Solution: create a temporary non-banked model replica for Hessian collection via forward hooks, then apply GPTQ to the unbanked state dict.

Algorithm (based on IST-DASLab/gptq, ICLR 2023):
1. Collect H = X^T X per layer via 256 calibration batches
2. Column reordering by descending Hessian diagonal (actorder)
3. Block-wise Cholesky error compensation: propagate quantization error to remaining columns using H^{-1}
4. Per-row scale via 5-percentile search within the Cholesky framework

### Training Architecture

PR #414 stack + Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon ([PR #399](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/399)):

- 11L, 512d, 8H/4KV, **LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP 3×**
- BigramHash(1536), XSA4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128
- EMA(0.997) + Tight SWA, **Full Hessian GPTQ int6** + lzma
- Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon (83.3ms/step)

### Eval Timing

| Phase | Time |
|-------|------|
| Training | 600s |
| Hessian collection (256 batches) | ~25s |
| GPTQ quantization | ~60s |
| Sliding window eval (stride=64) | ~100s |
| **Total eval** | **~185s (< 10 min)** |

No TTT needed.

### Credits

- **Full GPTQ**: Adapted from [PR #535](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/535) by @raahilshah (first Full GPTQ) and [PR #569](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/569) by @gowtham0992 (VRL + GPTQ)
- **LeakyReLU²**: [PR #493](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/493) by @parinzee, [PR #518](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/518) by @sofiabod
- **Optimizer (Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon)**: [PR #399](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/399) by @abaybektursun
- **Base model**: [PR #414](https://github.com/openai/parameter-golf/pull/414) by @signalrush
- **GPTQ algorithm**: Frantar et al., "GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers" (ICLR 2023)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
